home.heroTitle: A sail toward what truly matters.
home.heroLead: We are a non-profit sailing crew living aboard a Catana 47 catamaran in San Blas. Ten days of freediving, yoga, and slow ocean travel — booked directly with us, not a charter broker.
home.ikigaiTitle: The meeting point of passion, calling and profession.
home.pillarPassion: The sea is not a backdrop. It is the reason we wake before dawn.
home.pillarCalling: We left careers on land to live by tide, wind, and anchor watch.
home.pillarProfession: Certified skippers, instructors and hosts — hospitality at 8 knots.
home.ikigaiBody: Ikigai (生き甲斐) is the Japanese sense of a life worth living. Aboard, it stops being a concept and becomes a daily rhythm.
home.routeBody: From the San Blas archipelago through the Panama Canal and across the Pacific toward French Polynesia in 2027. Follow our anchorages on the live map.
home.ctaTitle: Most voyages start with a message.
home.instagramEmpty: We post from the boat — the latest photos and reels, straight from San Blas. Follow along on Instagram.
concierge.title: Ask Ikigai
concierge.subtitle: Questions about a trip, the boat, or San Blas? Ask away.
about.title: About us
about.intro1: Ikigai Sailing is a growing community of dreamers, sailors, freedivers, divers, kitesurfers and adventure-lovers.
about.intro2: We are a non-profit amateur sports association, recognised by CONI and affiliated with MSP Italia. United by a love for the sea, freedom and good food, with one mission: to live in harmony with nature, following the wind and the waves.
about.luca.bio: RYA Yachtmaster Offshore and a CONI-recognised sailing instructor. Freediving instructor for AIDA and Apnea Total, and a certified IKO kitesurf instructor. His love of hospitality and good food makes every passage a Dolce Vita of sport, meditation and Janzu.
about.brano.bio: Expert diver — IANTD Divemaster, Cave Diver and Rescue Diver. His passion for the sea has taken him to over 30 countries. In 2022 he co-founded Ikigai Sailing with Luca, merging adventure, sustainability and freedom.
about.paola.bio: French, 35, with two great passions: cooking and the sea. Aboard Ikigai she unites them — a living, simple, heartfelt cuisine that tells stories and turns every meal into a moment of genuine pleasure.
about.visionTitle: Not just a boat — a way of life.
about.visionBody: Ikigai Sailing is about returning to nature, discovering new horizons, and activities that nourish body and soul — the pleasure of sharing authentic moments, practising sport, and living every day as a break from the fast-paced modern world. A sailing journey around the world, teaching and sharing our passions and a healthy, sustainable lifestyle.
ikigai.intro: The Japanese term Ikigai means “reason for being” — the art of finding one’s inner balance. It is the compass that guides us toward deep fulfilment by combining what we love, what we are good at, what the world needs, and what we can be paid for.
ikigai.applied: Aboard Ikigai Sailing we turn this philosophy into a way of life — one that explores the world and enriches everyone who steps on board, for personal and collective growth.
ikigai.diagramTitle: Where the four meet, there is Ikigai.
ikigai.loveBody: Adventure, sailing, friendship, travel, nature, cuisine, sport, and personal growth.
ikigai.goodBody: Planning trips, managing the boat and navigation, team building, hospitality, problem-solving, cooking and teaching.
ikigai.needsBody: Freedom, sharing, awareness, friendship, trust, sustainability, dreaming, self-care, and understanding new cultures.
ikigai.paid: What we can be paid for
ikigai.paidBody: Sharing life on board, organising trips, and offering onboard courses in various sports disciplines.
ikigai.passionBody: For the sea, sailing, adventure, travel, cuisine and sport.
ikigai.vocationBody: Bringing people closer to their passions, to others, to nature, and to themselves.
ikigai.missionBody: Promoting sustainable tourism and a healthy lifestyle that nourishes our essential needs and fosters true well-being.
ikigai.professionBody: As professional skippers and instructors, we share a seafaring culture of adventure and well-being, with courses in sailing, freediving, fishing, diving, kitesurf and yoga.
cart.title: Your cart
cart.note: Payments are member contributions to our ASD.
trips.invitationLead: These longer voyages are reserved for ASD members who already know the boat and crew. Come aboard once, then sail further with us.
